features.description: Docker Compose starts PostgreSQL 15 with healthy status and OMOP schema loaded from init scripts
steps: Run docker compose up -d postgres
Wait for postgres healthcheck to pass
Connect with psql and list tables including person and concept
Confirm row counts are zero or expected seed only

features.description: Trino coordinator starts and registers the omop PostgreSQL catalog
steps: Start full stack with docker compose up -d
Call Trino /v1/info and assert node state active
Run SHOW CATALOGS and assert omop catalog appears
Run SHOW SCHEMAS FROM omop and assert public schema

features.description: FastAPI service exposes GET /health returning 200 and service metadata
steps: Start api service
curl http://localhost:28000/health
Assert JSON contains status healthy and service name
Assert no PHI-like keys in response body

features.description: FastAPI GET /ready returns 200 with readiness payload
steps: curl http://localhost:28000/ready
Assert status ready in JSON
Repeat under load with 10 parallel requests
Assert all return 200

features.description: OMOP person table exists with CDM v5.4 columns and primary key on person_id
steps: Describe person via psql \d person
Assert gender_concept_id and year_of_birth NOT NULL
Insert minimal valid row and rollback or delete in test
Verify foreign key behavior documented for downstream ETL

features.description: visit_occurrence references person and supports visit window columns
steps: Verify visit_occurrence FK to person
Assert visit_start_date and visit_end_date NOT NULL
Query via Trino SELECT COUNT(*) FROM omop.public.visit_occurrence
Document visit_type_concept_id usage for ETL mappers

features.description: condition_occurrence models diagnoses with condition_concept_id indexing
steps: Confirm idx_condition_person and idx_condition_concept exist
Run EXPLAIN on filter by person_id in PostgreSQL
Run same predicate through Trino and compare plans
Record expected cardinality guidance for benchmarks

features.description: drug_exposure supports medication eras core fields and numeric quantity
steps: Validate drug_exposure column types match CDM spec
Test insert with quantity and days_supply
Query aggregate exposure days per person in Trino
Validate index usage on drug_concept_id

features.description: procedure_occurrence captures procedures with dates and visit linkage
steps: Check procedure_date NOT NULL constraint
Link sample row to visit_occurrence_id when present
Run Trino join person to procedure_occurrence
Assert procedure_type_concept_id documented

features.description: measurement table supports lab results value_as_number and range bounds
steps: Insert measurement with value_as_number and range_low or range_high
Query measurements by measurement_concept_id
Verify idx_measurement_concept used in plan
Export sample as JSON-safe (no PHI in fixtures)

features.description: observation table supports qualitative and quantitative facts
steps: Test value_as_string length boundary from CDM
Join observation to visit when visit_occurrence_id set
Run Trino filter on observation_type_concept_id
Document observation_event_id optional usage

features.description: concept vocabulary table loads and indexes support Athena-style lookups
steps: Bulk load vocabulary subset or use seed script
Query by concept_code and vocabulary_id using idx_concept_code
Measure query latency under 10k concepts
Validate standard_concept flag semantics documented

features.description: concept_relationship enforces composite primary key and relationship_id
steps: Insert valid concept_id_1 concept_id_2 relationship_id tuple
Attempt duplicate insert and expect failure
Trino query relationships for a concept set
Document valid_end_date filtering for active edges

features.description: concept_ancestor supports hierarchy rollups for analytics
steps: Insert ancestor and descendant with min and max levels
Run self-join query for descendants of root concept
Compare performance with unrolled paths for one benchmark query
Document OHDSI hierarchy expectations

features.description: PostgreSQL indexes on person_id for fact tables match expected ETL query patterns
steps: List all idx_* on fact tables from schema file
Run pg_stat_user_indexes after synthetic load
Identify unused indexes and document rationale to keep
Adjust only with migration and benchmark proof

features.description: Trino pushdown to PostgreSQL works for filtered scans on person_id
steps: Enable EXPLAIN ANALYZE equivalent in Trino for omop catalog
Run SELECT with WHERE person_id = ?
Confirm connector pushdown in plan
Log fetch-size effect on duration

features.description: Query optimization playbook documents join order for person-centric cohort extracts
steps: Write docs section with recommended join order
Add example Trino SQL for cohort slice
Run benchmark on 1M synthetic rows when generator exists
Store results in non-PHI metrics file

features.description: config/postgres-init.sh applies schema idempotently on empty database
steps: Create fresh database volume
Run postgres-init.sh with env vars
Re-run script and assert IF NOT EXISTS behavior causes no failure
Document when to use init script vs docker-entrypoint-initdb.d

features.description: Schema migrations folder exists with versioned SQL or Flyway/Alembic strategy
steps: Add migrations/ with 001_initial_omop.sql pointer or tool config
Run migration against empty DB and verify checksum
Run migration against already-initialized DB (no-op or skip)
Document rollback policy

features.description: Production Trino catalog uses secrets manager for JDBC password not repo literals
steps: Replace docker dev catalog pattern with mounted secret in K8s spec
Verify config/trino-catalog-omop.properties documents env placeholders only
Scan repo for hardcoded passwords with automated secret scan
Document rotation procedure

features.description: PostgreSQL authentication restricted to application roles with least privilege
steps: Define omop_rw and omop_ro roles in migration
Grant SELECT only to Trino user if read-only federation required
Block superuser from application connections in prod checklist
Test connection denial for wrong role

features.description: Audit log hook design documents who queried OMOP via Trino with tenant id
steps: Draft AUDIT_TRAIL.md section for query events
Map fields to platform audit event schema
Ensure no raw PHI in log payload examples
Review with security stakeholder

features.description: Multi-tenant schema strategy documented omop_{tenant} vs row-level security
steps: Write ADR comparing schema-per-tenant vs RLS
Prototype search_path or catalog per tenant for Trino
List migration impact for each option
Record MedinovAI platform decision

features.description: init.sh completes with INIT_SUCCESS when all three services are healthy
steps: Run bash init.sh from clean machine with Docker
Capture INIT_SUCCESS line
Stop stack and rerun idempotently
Fail fast with INIT_FAILED when port conflict occurs

features.description: PostgreSQL autovacuum and analyze settings tuned for bulk OMOP loads
steps: Document recommended postgresql.conf for load phase
Run COPY-based load test and measure bloat
Adjust autovacuum_vacuum_scale_factor if needed
Commit tuning guide to README or docs/

features.description: Trino memory and spill settings documented for large joins across fact tables
steps: Add config/jvm.config or coordinator notes for dev
Run join query exceeding default memory with controlled data
Enable spill to disk if supported and measure
Document production values separately

features.description: Standardized vocabulary load pipeline from OHDSI Athena (non-PHI) scripted
steps: Script download checksum verify for vocabulary CSVs
Load concept and concept_synonym when added to schema
Validate row counts against release notes
Store script under scripts/ with usage in README

features.description: CDM source metadata tables added if integration platform requires provenance
steps: Compare core-only schema to full CDM for _metadata tables
Add migration for cdm_source when approved
Wire ETL to populate source name and version
Query provenance from Trino

features.description: death table or linkage to person end-of-life modeled per CDM extension policy
steps: Review OHDSI death table requirement for deployment
Add migration if clinical use case approved
Restrict access at API layer
Document ethics and compliance review gate

features.description: visit_detail table added when ambulatory detail granularity is required
steps: Add visit_detail DDL migration referencing visit_occurrence
Update Trino queries that assumed visit only
Index visit_detail for person and visit keys
Validate ETL mapping from FHIR Encounters

features.description: TLS termination documented for Trino and PostgreSQL outside Docker Desktop
steps: List required certs for Trino HTTPS
Document Postgres sslmode for JDBC
Add example ingress annotations for K8s
Verify health probes still work with TLS

features.description: Backup and restore runbook for omop_pg_data volume and logical dumps
steps: Document pg_dump command with schedule
Test restore to fresh volume
Align with ~/medinovai-backups policy
Record RPO and RTO targets

features.description: Partitioning strategy evaluated for largest fact tables by event date
steps: Identify candidate tables for native partitioning
Prototype monthly partitions on measurement_date
Measure prune effectiveness in PostgreSQL
Summarize Trino partition awareness

features.description: Integration test asserts Trino can read person count matching PostgreSQL
steps: Add pytest that runs against docker-compose URLs
Compare counts from psql and Trino
Skip gracefully when docker unavailable in CI
Mark feature passes when green in pipeline

features.description: Data classification tags applied to repos env vars and connection strings
steps: Label OMOP_DB_* as confidential in docs
Ensure .env.example has no real secrets
Run grep for password= in tracked files
Fix any violations

features.description: GET /ready checks PostgreSQL connectivity with lightweight SELECT 1
steps: Add asyncpg or SQLAlchemy dependency
Implement pool with timeout
Return 503 when DB unreachable
Keep logs phi_safe with no connection string logging

features.description: GET /ready optionally checks Trino coordinator /v1/info
steps: Add httpx or aiohttp client
Call internal trino URL from api container
Degrade gracefully if Trino optional in some profiles
Unit test with mocked responses

features.description: README quickstart enables new developer to query first Trino SQL in under 10 minutes
steps: Follow README from clone to query without insider knowledge
Time the path
Fix gaps found
Add copy-paste example with synthetic ids only

features.description: OpenAPI published for API when administrative endpoints are added
steps: Enable FastAPI openapi.json at /openapi.json
Version API prefix /api/v1
Add authentication scheme to spec when MSS integrated
Publish to developer portal registry when available

features.description: Module manifest or service registration posts health URL to medinovai-registry when deployed
steps: Add module-manifest.yaml stub
Document SERVICE_NAME and PORT for K8s
Align probes with /health and /ready
Validate against registry contract

features.description: Connection pooling sized for Trino workers and PostgreSQL max_connections
steps: Document formula for pool size vs max_connections
Set Trino postgresql connection pool properties if applicable
Load test concurrent queries
Adjust and document

features.description: CI workflow validates docker compose config and builds API image
steps: Add GitHub Actions or equivalent
Run docker compose config
Run docker build .
Fail on schema SQL syntax error with sqlparse or psql dry run

features.description: PHI prohibition verified in logs for API and Trino query logging samples
steps: Review default Trino logging config for query text redaction options
Ensure API middleware never logs request bodies with clinical fields
Add lint or test for forbidden log patterns
Document operator configuration

features.description: k8s/deployment.yaml stub matches Dockerfile port 8000 and health endpoints
steps: Create k8s/deployment.yaml with imagePullPolicy Never for local
Set REGISTRY_URL and SERVICE_NAME env
Configure liveness and readiness probes
Validate with kubectl apply --dry-run=client

features.description: Phase E integration contract alignment with medinovai-data-services OMOP endpoints documented
steps: Cross-link data-contracts OMOP or integration YAML in README
List which operations remain in this repo vs data-services
Open tracking issue for contract drift
Obtain platform architect sign-off
